security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be tampered with without detection.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks mechanisms to detect or prevent vote tampering.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate the integrity of vote messages.
The actor is able to access and modify the vote data before submission.

mitigation.strategy: Implement tamper-evident mechanisms for vote messages.

description: An attacker may alter the content of a vote before it is processed by the contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be submitted anonymously, making repudiation possible.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The voting process lacks mechanisms to ensure accountability.

assumptions: The system does not require user authentication or identification during voting.
The vote submission process is not logged or traceable to individual users.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a logging mechanism to record votes and link them to user identities.

description: An attacker may cast votes and then deny their involvement.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be exposed during transmission or storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks protection against unauthorized access to vote data.

assumptions: Vote data is transmitted over an insecure channel.
The system's database is vulnerable to unauthorized access.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote data during transmission and storage.

description: Sensitive information about the votes may be revealed to unauthorized entities.
